title: Home
hero_subtitle: Explore fascinating historical events while building your English vocabulary, grammar, and comprehension skills. Learning has never been this engaging.
feature_section_subtitle: A comprehensive toolkit designed to make learning English through history immersive and effective.
feature_vocabulary_desc: Learn new words in context through historical texts and stories. Expand your lexicon naturally.
feature_grammar_desc: Master grammar structures by analyzing real historical documents and literary works.
feature_history_desc: Dive into key events, civilizations, and cultural milestones across different eras.
feature_quiz_desc: Test your knowledge with adaptive quizzes that track your progress and target weak areas.
footer_text: English Learning History — Learn English, One Era at a Time.
